arts.ttl: Gent set sights on Kortrijk goalkeeper as Daniel Schmidt nears return to Japan
arts.sum: According to Sacha Tavolieri, Gent are looking to sign Kortrijk goalkeeper Tom Vandenberghe. The side are anticipating the imminent departure of veteran Japanese goalkeeper Daniel Schmidt, who is in Japan…

arts.ttl: “Not a big dream of mine” – Midfielder appears to dismiss move to Leeds United under Daniel Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United currently find themselves top of the Championship table and in a very good position to go on and seal promotion to the Premier League. Of course, it won’t be the first time Daniel Farke has taken a team to England’s top flight, having done so previously with Norwich City.
